title: Service Template KPI
description: KPI is the data structure that drives the monitoring of service metrics. KPI objects for service templates differ slightly from KPI objects for services. For example, service template KPIs can only use base searches, not ad hoc searches or searches based on data models. You can't enable anomaly detection for service template KPIs. KPI objects, `kpis`, for service templates are defined and contained within the `base_service_template` object type data structure.

attributes.name: _key
attributes.label: _key
attributes.description: Auto-generated unique ID for this KPI.

attributes.name: title
attributes.label: title
attributes.description: User-defined name for the KPI

attributes.name: description
attributes.label: description
attributes.description: User-defined description for the KPI.

attributes.name: type
attributes.label: type
attributes.description: kpi_primary.

attributes.name: kpi_threshold_template_id
attributes.label: kpi_threshold_template_id
attributes.description: User-defined ID for the KPI. Used to refer to KPIs within a KPI template in ITSI modules. This uniquely identifies a KPI template in ITSI.

attributes.name: is_service_entity_filter
attributes.label: is_service_entity_filter
attributes.description: If true a filter is used on the search based on the entities included in the service.

attributes.name: datamode
attributes.label: datamode
attributes.description: The data model to use for search generation if this is a data model type search.

attributes.name: datamodel_filter
attributes.label: datamodel_filter
attributes.description: ITSI generated clauses for user-defined filters on top of the data model fields. Used in the KPI search to filter events required by this KPI.

attributes.name: threshold_field
attributes.label: threshold_field
attributes.description: User-specified field on which statistical operations are performed and whose value determines KPI health.

attributes.name: entity_statop
attributes.label: entity_statop
attributes.description: Statistical operation (avg, max, mean, and so on) used to combine data for alert_values on a per entity basis (used if entity_breakdown is true).

attributes.name: aggregate_statop
attributes.label: aggregate_statop
attributes.description: Statistical operation (avg, max, median, stdev, and so on) used to combine data for the aggregate alert_value (used for all KPI).

attributes.name: urgency
attributes.label: urgency
attributes.description: User-assigned importance value for this KPI.

attributes.name: unit
attributes.label: unit
attributes.description: User-defined units for the values in threshold field.

attributes.name: entity_id_fields
attributes.label: entity_id_fields
attributes.description: Fields from this KPI's search events that will be mapped to the alias fields defined in entities for the service containing this KPI. This field enables the KPI search to tie the aliases of entities to the fields from the KPI events in identifying entities at search time.

attributes.name: entity_alias_filtering_fields
attributes.label: entity_alias_filtering_fields
attributes.description: Subset of aliases from all entities included in the service containing this KPI, to restrict this KPI to only the subset of entities matching via the subset of aliases. Helps filter entities for this KPI among the ones selected in the service containing this KPI.

attributes.name: cron_schedule
attributes.label: cron_schedule
attributes.description: The cron schedule that determines the frequency of this KPI search.

attributes.name: base_search
attributes.label: base_search
attributes.description: KPI search defined by user for this KPI. All generated searches for the KPI are based on this search.

attributes.name: kpi_base_search
attributes.label: kpi_base_search
attributes.description: A basic search generated for the KPI search.

attributes.name: alert_on
attributes.label: alert_on
attributes.description: Specified if the threshold type for this KPI is "Per Entity" or "Aggregate" or "Both". Possible values: aggregate, entities, both.

attributes.name: alert_period
attributes.label: alert_period
attributes.description: User specified interval to run the KPI search in minutes.

attributes.name: alert_lag
attributes.label: alert_lag
attributes.description: Contains the number of seconds of lag to apply to the alert search. The maximum is 30 minutes (1800 seconds).

attributes.name: search_alert_earliest
attributes.label: search_alert_earliest
attributes.description: Earliest time to look for events every time KPI search runs. This determines how far back each time window is during KPI search runs.

attributes.name: tz_offset
attributes.label: tz_offset
attributes.description: ISO time zone offset. Note: Do not change this value.

attributes.name: time_variate_thresholds_specification_custom
attributes.label: time_variate_thresholds_specification_custom
attributes.description: If true, thresholds for alerts are pulled from time_variate_thresholds_specification.

attributes.name: adaptive_thresholds_is_enabled
attributes.label: adaptive_thresholds_is_enabled
attributes.description: Determines if adaptive threshold is enabled for this KPI.

attributes.name: adaptive_thresholding_training_window
attributes.label: adaptive_thresholding_training_window
attributes.description: Earliest time for the Adaptive Threshold training algorithm to run over (latest time is always 'now') (e.g. '-7d')

attributes.name: gap_severity
attributes.label: gap_severity
attributes.description: Severity level assigned for data gaps (info, normal, low, medium, high, critical, or unknown)

attributes.name: gap_severity_color
attributes.label: gap_severity_color
attributes.description: Severity color assigned for data gaps.

attributes.name: gap_severity_color_light
attributes.label: gap_severity_color_light
attributes.description: Severity color assigned for data gaps.

attributes.name: gap_severity_value
attributes.label: gap_severity_value
attributes.description: Severity value assigned for data gaps.

attributes.name: entity_thresholds
attributes.label: entity_thresholds
attributes.description: User-defined thresholding levels for "Per Entity" threshold type. For more information, see KPI Threshold Setting.

attributes.name: aggregate_thresholds
attributes.label: aggregate_thresholds
attributes.description: User-defined thresholding levels for "Aggregate" threshold type. For more information, see KPI Threshold Setting.

attributes.name: enabled
attributes.label: enabled
attributes.description: If set to 1, KPI is enabled. If absent or not set to 1, KPI is disabled. On upgrade KPI is flagged as enabled. Field is read-only.

attributes.name: entity_breakdown_id_field
attributes.label: entity_breakdown_id_field
attributes.description: KPI search events are split by the alias field defined in entities for the service containing this KPI.

attributes.name: object_type
attributes.label: object_type
attributes.description: Name of the object type.

attributes.name: create_by
attributes.label: create_by
attributes.description: The user who created this object.

attributes.name: create_source
attributes.label: create_source
attributes.description: The sourcetype initiating create. Has value `manual` for user-initiated creates. For internal use only.

attributes.name: create_time
attributes.label: create_time
attributes.description: Timestamp at the time of creation based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: mod_source
attributes.label: mod_source
attributes.description: Sourcetype initiating modification. Has value `manual` for user-initiated modifications. For internal use only.

attributes.name: mod_time
attributes.label: mod_time
attributes.description: Timestamp of the last modification based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: _owner
attributes.label: _owner
attributes.description: Splunk user `nobody`.

attributes.name: _user
attributes.label: _user
attributes.description: User who performed the most recent operation on this object.

attributes.name: version
attributes.label: version
attributes.description: The version of the object. Currently the same as the ITSI app version.
